consistency.notes: The spell level (1st), school (Illusion), and casting time (1 action) are standard for this effect.

quality.notes: The description clearly outlines the visual alterations allowed, the limitations (body type structure remains), and the mechanic for discerning the illusion (Investigation check vs. Save DC).

mechanics.duration_impact: A 1-hour duration is typical for self-buffs that require an action to dismiss, allowing flexibility.
mechanics.interaction_with_reality: Explicitly stated that physical inspection reveals the illusion (objects pass through, tactile sensation is absent), which is crucial for defining the spell's limits.

llm_audit.archivist_notes: This entry is well-documented and adheres to standard 5e spell conventions. The mechanical description of how the illusion interacts with touch and inspection is clear and prevents misuse or confusion regarding its illusory nature.
